response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project work via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust exposure in commercial routing or geospatial data pipelines, and shows no evidence of distributed systems or navigation data tile optimization — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Built open-source GIS platform with real-world usage (Green Map)
Demonstrated ability to learn and apply diverse languages (DLang, Node, C++)
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and system reliability practices
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or geospatial pipelines
Lacks explicit experience with routing tiles, map data transformation, or real-time traffic integration
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not aligned with C++-centric role requirements
